author: ssing2
title: 880-Line God Handler with Primitive Transaction Simulation
notes: Multiple factual inaccuracies: file is 632 lines not 880, has 7 handlers not 8. Claims helpers are 'repeated across handlers' but they are properly extracted into shared functions (lines 56-68). The transaction snapshot/restore pattern (lines 70-105) is basic but appropriate for an internal CLI tool managing JSON files. Grouping related subcommand handlers in one module is standard Python CLI practice, not a 'God Object'. The submission overstates severity and mischaracterizes the code structure.
